category_sources: source_facts.description says 'Powerful editor for programmers'; official JED homepage describes it as a text editor for programmers.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title: 'The JED Programmer's Editor' at https://www.jedsoft.org/jed/.
docs_sources: Official JED homepage links to 'Documentation' at https://www.jedsoft.org/jed/docs.html.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository README links back to https://www.jedsoft.org/jed/ and identifies jedsoft/jed as the programmer's text editor source.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists jed and jed-script; source_facts.description and official homepage identify a programmer text editor; official homepage says JED uses the S-Lang library.
